title: Ranchitas Queso Creamy Corn Casserole
ingredients: 1/2 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
1 bag of Ranchitas Queso chips for serving
instructions: Step 1. In a small skillet or casserole, melt the butter over medium heat.
Step 2. Add the corn kernels and sauté until hot and lightly golden.
Step 3. Add the crema and mix until well combined.
Step 4. Stir in the shredded cheese and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and creamy.
Step 5. Season with salt and chili powder to taste.
Step 6. Serve the warm casserole with Ranchitas Queso chips to use as scoops.
description: A creamy and comforting Mexican-style corn casserole, perfect for dipping with crispy Ranchitas Queso chips. Easy, quick, and full of flavor.
